mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PAYMENT (PAYMENT_ID, FK_MEMBERID, ORDER_ID, CHARGE_AMOUNT, STATUS, REQUESTED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_PAYMENT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{orderId}, #{chargeAmount}, #{status}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT PAYMENT_ID, FK_MEMBERID, ORDER_ID, CHARGE_AMOUNT, STATUS, REQUESTED_AT, PAID_AT, CANCELLED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBL_PAYMENT WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_PAYMENT SET STATUS = 'PAID', PAY_METHOD = #{payMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PG_PROVIDER = #{pgProvider, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMB_PG_PROVIDER = #{embPgProvider, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAID_AT = SYSDATE, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND STATUS = 'PENDING'
UPDATE TBL_PAYMENT SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POINT_WALLET (POINT_WALLET_ID, FK_MEMBERID, AVAILABLE_BALANCE, RESERVED_BALANCE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_POINT_WALLET_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, 0, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_POINT_WALLET SET AVAILABLE_BALANCE = NVL(AVAILABLE_BALANCE, 0) + #{amount}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POINT_TRANSACTION (POINT_TX_ID, FK_POINT_WALLET_ID, FK_PAYMENT_ID, FK_BANNER_ID, TX_TYPE, TX_STATUS, DELTA_AVAILABLE, DELTA_RESERVED, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_POINT_TRANSACTION_POINT_TX_ID.NEXTVAL, #{pointWalletId}, (SELECT PAYMENT_ID FROM TBL_PAYMENT WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}), NULL, #{txType}, #{txStatus}, #{deltaAvailable}, 0, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, PAYMENT_ID DESC) AS rno, PAYMENT_ID AS paymentId, FK_MEMBERID AS memberId, ORDER_ID AS orderId, CHARGE_AMOUNT AS chargeAmount, STATUS AS status, PAY_METHOD AS payMethod, PG_PROVIDER AS pgProvider, EMB_PG_PROVIDER AS embPgProvider, TO_CHAR(REQUESTED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS requestedAt, TO_CHAR(PAID_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS paidAt, TO_CHAR(CANCELLED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS canceledAt, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt FROM TBL_PAYMENT WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} ) WHERE rno BETWEEN #{startRno} AND #{endRno}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POINT_TRANSACTION PT WHERE PT.FK_POINT_WALLET_ID = ( SELECT POINT_WALLET_ID FROM TBL_POINT_WALLET WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T.CREATED_AT DESC, T.POINT_TX_ID DESC) AS rno, T.POINT_TX_ID AS pointTxId, T.FK_POINT_WALLET_ID AS pointWalletId, T.FK_PAYMENT_ID AS paymentId, T.FK_BANNER_ID AS bannerId, T.TX_TYPE AS txType, T.TX_STATUS AS txStatus, T.DELTA_AVAILABLE AS deltaAvailable, T.DELTA_RESERVED AS deltaReserved, T.AVAILABLE_BALANCE_AFTER AS availableBalanceAfter, T.RESERVED_BALANCE_AFTER AS reservedBalanceAfter, T.TX_LABEL AS txLabel, T.TX_MEMO AS txMemo, TO_CHAR(T.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM ( SELECT PT.POINT_TX_ID, PT.FK_POINT_WALLET_ID, PT.FK_PAYMENT_ID, PT.FK_BANNER_ID, PT.TX_TYPE, PT.TX_STATUS, PT.DELTA_AVAILABLE, PT.DELTA_RESERVED, PT.CREATED_AT,
SUM(NVL(PT.DELTA_AVAILABLE, 0)) OVER ( PARTITION BY PT.FK_POINT_WALLET_ID ORDER BY PT.CREATED_AT ASC, PT.POINT_TX_ID ASC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW ) AS AVAILABLE_BALANCE_AFTER,
SUM(NVL(PT.DELTA_RESERVED, 0)) OVER ( PARTITION BY PT.FK_POINT_WALLET_ID ORDER BY PT.CREATED_AT ASC, PT.POINT_TX_ID ASC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW ) AS RESERVED_BALANCE_AFTER,
CASE WHEN PT.TX_TYPE = 'CHARGE' THEN '충전' WHEN PT.TX_TYPE = 'USE' THEN '사용' WHEN PT.TX_TYPE = 'REFUND' THEN '환불' ELSE PT.TX_TYPE END AS TX_LABEL,
CASE WHEN PT.TX_TYPE = 'CHARGE' THEN '포인트 충전' WHEN PT.TX_TYPE = 'USE' AND PT.FK_BANNER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN '배너 광고 결제' WHEN PT.TX_TYPE = 'USE' THEN '포인트 사용' WHEN PT.TX_TYPE = 'REFUND' THEN '포인트 환불' ELSE '-' END AS TX_MEMO
FROM TBL_POINT_TRANSACTION PT WHERE PT.FK_POINT_WALLET_ID = ( SELECT POINT_WALLET_ID FROM TBL_POINT_WALLET WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} ) ) T ) WHERE rno BETWEEN #{startRno} AND #{endRno}

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'PAID' THEN CHARGE_AMOUNT END), 0) AS PAID_TOTAL, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'PENDING' THEN CHARGE_AMOUNT END), 0) AS PENDING_TOTAL, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'CANCELED' THEN CHARGE_AMOUNT END), 0) AS CANCEL_TOTAL FROM TBL_PAYMENT WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
SELECT POINT_WALLET_ID, FK_MEMBERID, AVAILABLE_BALANCE, RESERVED_BALANCE FROM TBL_POINT_WALLET WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POINT_TRANSACTION (POINT_TX_ID, FK_POINT_WALLET_ID, FK_PAYMENT_ID, FK_BANNER_ID, TX_TYPE, TX_STATUS, DELTA_AVAILABLE, DELTA_RESERVED, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_POINT_TRANSACTION_POINT_TX_ID.NEXTVAL, #{pointWalletId}, NULL, #{bannerId}, #{txType}, #{txStatus}, #{deltaAvailable}, 0, SYSDATE)
